title: tragacantha mollis
intro: Tragacantha mollis, also known as Smooth Milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are used to create teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal remedies often utilize Tragacantha mollis to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
